features.featureTitle: In RideRequestForm.tsx, conditionally render the Pickup Pincode and Pickup Area fields based on locationMode state: when locationMode === 'gps', hide both fields completely (do not render them); when locationMode === 'manual', show both fields and keep them required.

In RideRequestForm.tsx, when the browser's GPS permission is denied (the existing geolocation error callback fires), automatically set locationMode back to 'manual', re-show the Pickup Pincode and Pickup Area fields, and display the inline error message: 'Location permission denied. Please enter pickup manually.' Do NOT modify the existing navigator.geolocation logic itself.
